mapper.select: SELECT v.visit_id AS visitId, p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, CONCAT_WS(' ', p.add1, NULLIF(p.add2, '')) AS address, p.first_image AS imageUrl, v.created_at AS visitedAt FROM visit v JOIN place p ON p.place_id = v.place_id AND p.is_active = TRUE WHERE v.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY v.created_at DESC, v.visit_id DESC

SELECT s.stamp_id AS stampId, s.stamp_name AS stampName, s.description AS description, s.requirement AS requirement, p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, (ms.member_stamp_id IS NOT NULL) AS isAcquired, ms.created_at AS acquiredAt FROM stamp s JOIN place p ON p.place_id = s.place_id AND p.is_active = TRUE LEFT JOIN member_stamp ms ON ms.stamp_id = s.stamp_id AND ms.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE s.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY s.stamp_id

SELECT c.course_id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, c.place_cnt AS placeCnt, mcs.visited_cnt AS visitedCnt, mcs.progress_rate AS progressRate, mcs.is_completed AS isCompleted FROM member_course_state mcs JOIN course c ON c.course_id = mcs.course_id AND c.is_active = TRUE WHERE mcs.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY mcs.is_completed ASC, mcs.progress_rate DESC, c.course_id
